domain: education lab apparatus, physics demos, STEM kits, classroom mechanisms, and training fixtures

ideas.product_context: Classroom mechanics apparatus for demonstrating friction, acceleration, and component resolution on slopes.
ideas.core_function: Allows a ramp to pivot and lock at repeatable angles for physics experiments.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hinge-and-indexing side bracket with angle detents and a pivot bore.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing coaxial hinge geometry, radial detent patterns, angular references, clearance slots, and structurally meaningful mounting features.

ideas.product_context: Physics lab projectile-motion demonstrator used to set launch angle and compare measured range against theory.
ideas.core_function: Provides precise elevation adjustment and locking for a spring or pneumatic projectile launcher.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved quadrant plate with pivot hole, degree scale region, arced locking slot, and mounting bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved profiles, concentric arcs, angular slots, hole patterns on radial layouts, and mixed cosmetic versus functional surfaces.

ideas.product_context: STEM optics kit for teaching focal length, image formation, and ray diagrams.
ideas.core_function: Holds a lens upright while sliding along a rail and allowing height adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined sliding carriage with rail groove, vertical post socket, clamp screw bore, and lens-retainer frame.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines precision rail-fit features, vertical datum relationships, circular optical openings, thin retaining lips, and screw-access clearances.

ideas.product_context: Classroom pendulum apparatus for studying period, amplitude, and gravitational acceleration.
ideas.core_function: Locks a pendulum string or rod at a selectable length without disturbing the pivot alignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Compact clamp block with pivot eye, split clamping channel, scale pointer boss, and fastener holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests small mechanical clearances, split-body geometry, aligned holes, nested channels, and datum-sensitive features.

ideas.product_context: Vector addition and equilibrium lab apparatus used with hanging masses and strings.
ideas.core_function: Positions a pulley around the edge of a circular force table at selectable angular locations.
ideas.likely_main_part: Edge-clamping pulley bracket with curved table contact face, pulley axle boss, and thumb-screw clamp feature.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires curved mating surfaces, offset axle geometry, clamp mechanics, load-bearing bosses, and asymmetric bracket shapes.

ideas.product_context: Mechanical STEM kit for demonstrating gear ratio, backlash, and center-distance effects.
ideas.core_function: Holds two interchangeable gears at controlled center distances for classroom demonstrations.
ideas.likely_main_part: Slotted base plate with parallel adjustment tracks, bearing pockets, reference marks, and mounting holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests repeated slots, bearing seats, center-distance constraints, symmetrical layouts, and features that imply assembly motion.

ideas.product_context: Mechanisms teaching fixture for showing how cam shapes convert rotation into reciprocating motion.
ideas.core_function: Constrains a follower so students can observe displacement generated by different cam profiles.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined follower guide block with vertical slide channel, cam clearance window, roller axle bore, and mounting flange.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines enclosed channels, open windows, bearing bores, sliding clearances, and mechanically meaningful internal cutouts.

ideas.product_context: Physics demonstration kit for vibration, resonance, and cantilever beam experiments.
ideas.core_function: Rigidly clamps a beam specimen while allowing repeatable overhang length adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Heavy clamp support block with stepped beam pocket, pressure-pad recess, clamp screw holes, and bench-mounting slots.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests stepped pockets, clamping geometry, load-path-aware massing, long slots, and relationships between flat reference surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Electromagnetism lab apparatus for positioning coils, Hall probes, or compass cards.
ideas.core_function: Supports a circular coil at a defined height and orientation while leaving the field region accessible.
ideas.likely_main_part: U-shaped coil support bracket with circular cradle, cable relief channel, base mounting holes, and vertical gussets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires partial circular supports, open-frame geometry, cable-management features, gussets, and orientation-critical mounting planes.

ideas.product_context: Classroom fluid mechanics fixture for demonstrating pressure multiplication and force transmission.
ideas.core_function: Holds two syringe or piston cylinders in aligned positions while supporting a small load platform.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined frame side plate with dual cylinder saddles, linkage pivot holes, spacer bosses, and base slots.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests multi-axis alignment, repeated but differently sized circular seats, structural side-plate profiling, pivot relationships, and assembly-driven clearances.
